ideation: This animation sequence shows the robot picking something up with a pickaxe.  The movement is deliberate and focused, reflecting the careful action of using a pickaxe. Frame 1 shows both arms at rest; Frame 2 shows the right arm reaching down to grab the pickaxe; Frame 3 shows the right arm lifting the pickaxe; Frame 4 shows the robot using the pickaxe to strike something, and frame 5 shows the robot returning to rest.

frames.beat: both arms hang at the sides, ready
right arm reaches down to grasp the pickaxe
the right arm lifts the tool with effort
swinging the pickaxe down with force
both arms return to a resting position
